message:
Add terminal link on agent cards to open tmux sessions via ttyd (#70)

Each agent card now shows a '▶ terminal' link that opens the agent's
tmux session in a browser tab via ttyd (port 7681). Agent name to tmux
session mapping: supervisor→supervisor, scanner→issue-scanner,
reviewer→reviewer, architect→feature, outreach→outreach.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
